title: How to Use Claude Design – Full AI Design Workflow 2026
summary: Claude Design is an AI design tool from Anthropic that automates parts of the design workflow by generating branded landing pages and design assets from a design system. The tutorial covers a 4-step framework including design system setup, generation, markup edits, and template deployment.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Master walks through Claude Design, an Anthropic design tool that generates branded landing pages and design assets from a defined design system. It lays out a four-step framework: setting up the design system, generating assets, making markup edits, and deploying templates. The relevance lies in showing how generative design ties output to a design system rather than one-off prompts, automating parts of an established workflow.
